Title: Data Destruction Equipment Service
Awardee: Data Security, Inc Lincoln NE 68508 USA
Description: Contract was awarded on a sole-source bases to Data Security Inc. Data Security, Inc. is the Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) for the three pieces of specialized data destruction equipment requiring service: the LM-1 Degausser, DX-8 Heavy-Duty Destruction Device, and SSMD-2mm Solid State Media Disintegrator. Competition is limited to this single source for the following reasons: Proprietary Knowledge and Technology: As the OEM, Data Security, Inc. possesses unique and proprietary knowledge of the equipment’s design, software, and operational tolerances. A critical maintenance task for the SSMD-2mm, for example, requires adjusting the gap between the Bed Knives and Grinder Shaft to a manufacturer-specified tolerance of .008 inches. This task requires specialized knowledge and tools that are not available to third-party vendors. Certified Technicians: Only Data Security, Inc. can provide factory-trained and certified technicians who have access to the latest technical bulletins, proprietary diagnostic tools, and software updates. Service by an unauthorized vendor could result in improper calibration, posing a risk to both the operator and the equipment's effectiveness. Maintaining NSA/DoD Compliance: This equipment is listed on the NSA Evaluated Products List (EPL) and is used to sanitize classified and sensitive digital media in accordance with DoD standards. Maintenance by an OEM-certified technician is essential to ensure the equipment continues to operate within its certified parameters. Failure to use a certified technician could nullify the equipment's compliance status and create a significant security risk. Availability of Genuine Parts: The OEM is the only guaranteed source for genuine, factory-specified replacement parts. Use of non-OEM parts by a third party could lead to equipment failure and would void the manufacturer's warranty. Therefore, only the OEM, Data Security, Inc., is capable of providing the required preventative maintenance service to the level of quality required to ensure operational security and reliability.

Title: TK-Replace EP Building 500 Room 4416 - Boom Replacement
SetASide: Service-Disabled Veteran-Owned Small Business Set Aside
Awardee: D SQUARE CONSTRUCTION LLC Tucson AZ 85713 USA
Description: The requirement is to remove existing Berchtold boom and two light suspensions that are past the lifecycle in Building 500 Room 4416. The Design/Build Contractor will engage an Architect/Engineer(A/E) to provide the design intent drawings, a complete set of construction documents with specification reflecting what is required in order to renovate, remove the existing boom and lights and replace with a Stryker boom (purchased on a separate contract). A new electrical panel will be required in the basement to then route up to the 4th floor, as the one presently installed is unable to carry the additional load required. Contractor and A/E are to provide all labor, material and technical expertise to do the work.

Title: Japan E-767 AWACS MIDS JTRS Upgrade Work Card Modification
Awardee: The Boeing Company Oklahoma City OK 73135 USA
Description: Pursuant to 10 U.S.C. 3204(a)(4), and in accordance with FAR 6.302-4, this is to certify that the sole source direction as authorized by Line 700 (4F) in the LOA - FMS case JA-D-QET has the effect of requiring the use of Other Than Full and Open Competition. The scope of this contract is amended to incorporate a critical, non-commercial, preparatory phase of work by adding an estimated cost. This new effort encompasses the specialized analytical services required to perform comprehensive pre-planning analysis and to subsequently develop detailed aircraft modification work cards. These work cards represent the foundational, step-by-step procedures that are an absolute prerequisite for the physical installation of the MJU modification. This analytical phase ensures that all technical documentation is reviewed and a clear, executable plan is in place, thereby mitigating risk and paving the way for the successful hands-on modification effort. This work will be accomplished within the overall Period of Performance of the base contract listed above.

Title: Azimuth (AZ) Motor/Brake Assembly XB Radar System
Awardee: CPI Satcom & Antenna Technologies Inc. Plano TX 75074 USA
Description: GLOBUS is a classified Joint Program. Maintenance and operation is performed at the OCON US site by personnel employed by the Joint partner. The missions are of a highly specialized nature, utilizing specialty type equipment and requiring highly trained personnel. This effort is for the procurement of custom motor/brake (P/N 53983-12-3500-01) assemblies for the GLOBUS X-Band Radar system. The Pedestal Control System (PCS) supports the rotational movement of the radar system. The PCS is composed of the servo controls and drive motor/brake assemblies. The AZ Motor/Brake Assembly consists of (brake pre-wiring, clamp collar and motor installation) which must be fully tested after assembly to guarantee it meets specification requirements. The motor/brake assembly consists of a motor (HP: 55, RPM 3600 with tach, high inertia) and a brake (125 ft-lb, 120 VAC, 50Hz, 256TC, VERT Above). The Brake Assembly Modification (P/N 53983-12-4600-01) is required prior to field installation for the GLOBUS X-Band Subsystem and is proprietary. The brake must be prepared electrically and mechanically to the specs in the Brake Assembly Modification to avoid catastrophic failure and damage. Quality testing and documentation is provided as part of the process.

Title: Red One Medical - Zimmer Biomet Procedural Packages
Awardee: RED ONE MEDICAL DEVICES LLC Savannah GA 31405 USA
Description: This procurement is Fixed-price with Economic Price Adjustment and was awarded sole source. This contract is sole source per 10 U.S.C. 2304(c)(1) Only One Responsible Source and No Other Supplies or Services Will Satisfy Agency Requirements , as implemented by FAR 6.302-1. It is sole source as there was only one respinsible source and no other supplies or services will satisfy agency requirements. In the current orthopedic marketplace, Red One Medical is the sole distributor for ZImmer Biomet products and product selection is not based solely on price and is overshadowed by physician prference/experience and highly specialized training on use of specific surgical items. This was confirmed through market research and that fact that only one source (the awardee) respinded to thes sources sought noitce.
